current_open.description: Current number of open HTTP connections for the node.

total_opened.description: Total number of HTTP connections opened for the node.

clients.description:
Information on current and recently-closed HTTP client connections.
Clients that have been closed longer than the `http.client_stats.closed_channels.max_age` setting will not be represented here.

id.description: Unique ID for the HTTP client.

agent.description:
Reported agent for the HTTP client.
If unavailable, this property is not included in the response.

local_address.description: Local address for the HTTP connection.

remote_address.description: Remote address for the HTTP connection.

last_uri.description: The URI of the client’s most recent request.

opened_time_millis.description: Time at which the client opened the connection.

closed_time_millis.description: Time at which the client closed the connection if the connection is closed.

last_request_time_millis.description: Time of the most recent request from this client.

request_count.description: Number of requests from this client.

request_size_bytes.description: Cumulative size in bytes of all requests from this client.

x_opaque_id.description:
Value from the client’s `x-opaque-id` HTTP header.
If unavailable, this property is not included in the response.

pipelines.description: Contains statistics about ingest pipelines for the node.

total.description: Contains statistics about ingest operations for the node.

count.description: Total number of documents ingested during the lifetime of this node.

current.description: Total number of documents currently being ingested.

failed.description: Total number of failed ingest operations during the lifetime of this node.

time_in_millis.description: Total time, in milliseconds, spent preprocessing ingest documents during the lifetime of this node.

ingested_as_first_pipeline_in_bytes.description:
Total number of bytes of all documents ingested by the pipeline.
This field is only present on pipelines which are the first to process a document.
Thus, it is not present on pipelines which only serve as a final pipeline after a default pipeline, a pipeline run after a reroute processor, or pipelines in pipeline processors.

produced_as_first_pipeline_in_bytes.description:
Total number of bytes of all documents produced by the pipeline.
This field is only present on pipelines which are the first to process a document.
Thus, it is not present on pipelines which only serve as a final pipeline after a default pipeline, a pipeline run after a reroute processor, or pipelines in pipeline processors.
In situations where there are subsequent pipelines, the value represents the size of the document after all pipelines have run.

count.description: Number of documents transformed by the processor.

current.description: Number of documents currently being transformed by the processor.

failed.description: Number of failed operations for the processor.

time_in_millis.description: Time, in milliseconds, spent by the processor transforming documents.

count.description: Total number of documents ingested during the lifetime of this node.

current.description: Total number of documents currently being ingested.

failed.description: Total number of failed ingest operations during the lifetime of this node.

time_in_millis.description: Total time, in milliseconds, spent preprocessing ingest documents during the lifetime of this node.

active.description: Number of active threads in the thread pool.

completed.description: Number of tasks completed by the thread pool executor.

largest.description: Highest number of active threads in the thread pool.

queue.description: Number of tasks in queue for the thread pool.

rejected.description: Number of tasks rejected by the thread pool executor.

threads.description: Number of threads in the thread pool.

cache_evictions.description: Total number of times the script cache has evicted old data.

compilations.description: Total number of inline script compilations performed by the node.

compilations_history.description: Contains this recent history of script compilations.

compilation_limit_triggered.description: Total number of times the script compilation circuit breaker has limited inline script compilations.
